steps.title: Use the flood clue
steps.content: The passage describes flourishing literary production after the Mexican Revolution and later calls it a flood of interesting writing. The blank needs a word for abundant production of poetry, fiction, essays, and more.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: B means a reversal or overthrow, C means formal disapproval, and D means shielding from harm. Those meanings do not describe a large amount of literary work being produced. A word meaning a copious flow fits. The answer is A.
